recommendations.title: The City of Lost Children
recommendations.overview: A scientist in a surrealist society kidnaps children to steal their dreams, hoping that they slow his aging process.

recommendations.title: Amélie

recommendations.title: Delicatessen
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic world, the residents of an apartment above the butcher shop receive an occasional delicacy of meat, something that is in low supply. A young man new in town falls in love with the butcher's daughter, which causes conflicts in he

recommendations.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
recommendations.overview: A 10-year-old child prodigy cartographer secretly leaves his family's ranch in Montana where he lives with his cowboy father and scientist mother and travels across the country on board a freight train to receive an award at the Smithsonian Institute

recommendations.title: Bigbug
recommendations.overview: Set in the world of 2045, where communities have robotic helpers, a group of suburbanites are locked in for their protection by their household robots, while a rogue, self-aware AI android revolt uprising takes place outside.

recommendations.title: Micmacs
recommendations.overview: While standing in the doorway of the video shop where he works, Bazil is inadvertently shot in the head. Now homeless and jobless, he is taken in by a troupe of misfits who live in a giant mound of trash. There Bazil begins his quest for revenge agai

recommendations.title: Alien Resurrection
recommendations.overview: Two hundred years after Lt. Ripley died, a group of scientists clone her, hoping to breed the ultimate weapon. But the new Ripley is full of surprises … as are the new aliens. Ripley must team with a band of smugglers to keep the creatures from reach

recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: Lovers Like Us
recommendations.overview: A young Frenchwoman fleeing her Italian fiancé in Caracas thrusts herself and those around her into madcap events.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.
